title: Rei 1 Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Rei 1= Kaworu???? Post by Axell » Tue Jun 02, 2009 9:23 pm I was skimming through my new version of death true^2 and i find this.... Right after there's the shot of kaworu from the op. Has this been talked about? I also don't believe in was in the original shot.

[]: Post by ZapX » Tue Jun 02, 2009 9:34 pm Old as...old. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1237 and several other places.

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 02, 2009 9:36 pm It's been brought up in several threads, some dating back to the ANF days. If I recall, there was never any consensus on any hidden meanings aside from the intention that there's some connection between Rei and Kaworu (obviously).

[]: Rei 1= Kaworu???? Post by Axell » Tue Jun 02, 2009 9:23 pm I was skimming through my new version of death true^2 and i find this.... Right after there's the shot of kaworu from the op. Has this been talked about? I also don't believe in was in the original shot.
